# Extracao: transcription_pdf_05-10X_Facebook_Page_Setup_Checklist

- **Fonte:** transcription_pdf_05-10X_Facebook_Page_Setup_Checklist.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Use this to get up and running on Facebook. Skip any step already completed!
Log in to your personal Facebook account (create one if needed!)
Go to 10xresource.com/fbpage to get started and give your page a name
Add up to 3 Categories for your page (start typing for recommendations)
Fill out the required information and click Create Page
Add a profile picture for the page
Add a cover photo (can be added later)
Optional: Take steps in “set up your page for success” (can be ignored)
Edit Page info (select the three dots to the right of ‘Share’,
then select ‘Edit Page info’)
All Optional: Phone, website, email, location, hours, price, policies, etc.
Add a Call to Action button (choose best option based on your business)
Add a username (facebook.com/username) - found in “About” in left column
Optional: Add a story (details about your company, ideally in a personal way)
Add yourself as a team member from the About page
Optional: Add other team members from Settings (assign roles)
Optional: Add photos, videos and content (click ‘Create Post’ on page)
Optional: Edit Template and Tabs in Settings
Go to Page Transparency and Claim Your Page
Invite people to like your page (on right, search for friends and colleagues)
CREATE FACEBOOK PAGE
When complete… starting growing followers!
